headline: SLB Azule AI Partnership Highlights Digital Growth And Valuation Opportunity
summary: SLB (NYSE:SLB) and Azule Energy have entered a three year partnership to deploy digital and AI enabled platforms across Angola's upstream operations. The agreement focuses on enterprise scale operational integration, workflow automation, and data driven decision support for Angola's energy sector. The collaboration extends SLB's digital transformation activity in Africa, building on its broader push into AI and cloud based energy software. For investors watching NYSE:SLB, this agreement...

headline: SLB’s Q1 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: SLB is set to report its first-quarter earnings this month, and analysts are forecasting a double-digit decline in its earnings.
